item.title: Memes vol 466 Cats
item.description:
Which of you sent this to that YouTuber- I mean it’s on tumblr and Pinterest as well
I love you, Arthur
Merrill
Anders
Chloe
And not long ago this phenomenal cat produced 7 kittens right out of a hat
Bug
Kittens from work
I think we’ll be taking these two
I’m taking him for sure- he’s my little son. But I’m not sure what to name him. So far I’ve been throwing around Emmett, Ducky, and Lewis. But idk the girl we’re getting I’ll be naming Miss Piggy, or Piglet and I kinda want to keep with the muppets theme
Scruffy and Froggy tax
Nessie tax
Liza Jane tax

item.title: A new kind of Goldberg machine

item.title: Nostalgia is the only home you get
item.description: The source is The Onion (because someone will if I don’t) I miss the ability to truly go ghost mode. The rectangle box of despair is also the rectangle box of participating in a society, can’t toss the fucker into the ocean, even though I want to 10x a day. The onion is being funny as per their job description but I do not miss the TMZ era of 00s and a bit of early 10s. I do miss the early viral content, it went viral organically, just as god intended. Gonna go rewatch Leeeeeeeroy Jenkins to relive the days of less worries.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: What Happened Today #116
item.description: ? The center cannot hold when power attacks its own foundations. Trump pardons corrupt sheriffs while calling the Justice Department "corrupt," attacks education at every level from Harvard to NIH research funding, and uses Memorial Day messages to attack judges blocking his deportation orders. But resistance is everywhere: dozens of NIH scientists walk out after their new director tells them they funded studies that led to the pandemic, environmental groups file lawsuits against illegal executive orders, and federal judges keep ruling against lawless overreach. The question isn't whether democracy can survive this assault, but it's whether we'll fight hard enough to make sure it does. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/witkoff-gaza-negotiations 2. https://go.govbrief.today/deportees-djibouti-murphy 3. https://go.govbrief.today/volvo-cut-3k 4. https://go.govbrief.today/nih-staff-walkout 5. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-funds-trade-schools 6. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-invesigating-past-cases 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pardons-jenkins 8. https://go.govbrief.today/memorial-day-message YESTERDAY - https://go.govbrief.today/internior-negative-america FIGHTING BACK - https://go.govbrief.today/earthjustice-sues-fishing
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Granted, I was fortunate, but in some ways it was the most peaceful time of my life.
item.dc:creator: IAlwaysUpvoteSunsets

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1373 (helpful amulet)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I thought about doing this when I was drinking this same drink to recover from food poisoning induced dehydration a few days ago. I felt like it just wasn't getting cold enough.
Speaking of cars. Mines fucked. Maybe? The rear brakes seem to suddenly be holding at times and activating the abs and it makes this weird scraping noise whenever I start moving... I cannot deal with this shit right now, I just can't. I will sacrifice a republican child to the Old Gods if I don't get a break soon. (I don't have any local billionaires.)
Definitely how I feel to most of my friends right now.
Especially God's problem.
Nom.
This would be an okay sign for a home.
had a dream where I went to go and find myself on a hike along the grand canyon except it wasn't at all what I imagined and my friends got stoned staring at the canyon and the Lincoln's Sparrow I rescued became a demonic abomination that ate the world and I was more mad about my friends getting stoned instead of bringing me the right hiking cloak instead of me bringing forth the apocalypse via demon sparrow so how's your morning?
Cause once again, I woke up screaming and in tears. Oh boy! I mean, at least I know I'm getting my REM sleep I guess.
I'm so done.
HOUSE WITH A FACE. I think this is the latest Neolithic/earliest Chalcolithic in date from a culture that lived in Romania through Ukraine. It starts with a C and has a hyphen and I don't care enough anymore about anything to look it up, I'm sorry I am REALLY not good right now and barely holding myself together from having a complete batshit meltdown, okay? Forgive me this once for not having the C hyphen T name at my fingertips because I can't spell it and I want someone to take my bronze weapons, kill me with them, and burn me on a funeral pyre right now. My brain is malfunctioning badly, I want to die, ot in the greatest state of mind right now. Anyway. Sorry for unloading. Moving on. What a cute house model, though, right?
I also kinda want to see this done in an Orthodox church with a censer of frankincense.
The only thing that's keeping me from turning to alcohol as a coping mechanism is that I firmly made it into a hobby, instead. I don't mean drinking it, I mean thinking about it, origins, landscapes, manufacturing meads, etc.
I do not remember any context for this.
On second thought, just throw me in the dumpster.
That's gonna work out really well for ya. I mean, unless you start a new big war... oh, so the guy must be a politician.
At minimum.
But they don't care.
Please punch, stab, or kill a Fascist for me today.
Seriously, I feel like every decision I've ever made was the wrong one.
Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
This has big @xbadxfaeriex vibes
Oh boy!
The only good point about food poisoning while stuck in your parents house is they had a TV and The Princess Bride was on, but I don't suggest laughing too hard if you get food poisoning.
Yep.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: [screams] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: They can't even agree which laws to break?! :D
item.description:
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/may/27/hegseth-pentagon-leak-investigation-wiretap
I saw a liberal say TDS stood for something clever, but I regret not taking the time to save it!
